screenshots.label: Platform hero shot
screenshots.narration: StickerNest is a spatial operating system. An infinite canvas where widgets, data, and event-driven pipelines compose into interactive spaces.

screenshots.label: Show canvas editing
screenshots.narration: The canvas is the desktop. Users create with intuitive drag-and-drop tools — shapes, text, images, and interactive widgets.

screenshots.label: Show asset panel
screenshots.narration: The widget ecosystem is the app store. Creators build and publish widgets. Users install and compose them into custom workflows.

screenshots.label: Show built-in widget variety
screenshots.annotation: Built-in widgets: Todo, Kanban, Image Gen, Stories, Pathfinder
screenshots.narration: We ship five built-in widgets out of the box — todo lists, kanban boards, image generation, interactive stories, and pathfinding. Third-party creators will build hundreds more.

screenshots.label: Show mode toggle (edit/preview)
screenshots.narration: Full theming support. Light, dark, high-contrast, and custom workspace themes. Every widget adapts automatically through CSS token injection.

screenshots.label: Back to edit mode then show tools
screenshots.narration: The pipeline editor connects widget outputs to widget inputs visually. No code required. Creators build automations by drawing connections.

screenshots.label: Show layers panel
screenshots.narration: Every object on the canvas is an entity in a managed scene graph. Z-order, visibility, grouping, spatial indexing — it's a real rendering engine.

screenshots.label: Zoom out for the big picture
screenshots.narration: StickerNest positions at the intersection of creative tools, spatial computing, and the widget economy. The canvas is the desktop. Widgets are apps. The event bus is IPC. The marketplace is the app store.

screenshots.label: Closing shot
screenshots.narration: Seven-layer architecture. Real-time collaboration. 2D, 3D, and VR. Creator commerce built in. Let's schedule a deeper dive.

metadata.hook: StickerNest is a spatial operating system — the canvas is the new desktop
metadata.description: StickerNest V5 platform overview: infinite canvas, widget ecosystem, pipeline automation, and the vision for spatial computing.
